fn close_fd(fd: libc::c_int) -> Result<(), std::io::Error> {
    let ret = unsafe { libc::close(fd) };
    if ret == -1 {
        Err(std::io::Error::last_os_error())
    } else {
        Ok(())
    }
}

fn write_data(fd: libc::c_int, data: &[u8]) -> Result<usize, std::io::Error> {
    let ret = unsafe { libc::write(fd, data.as_ptr() as *const libc::c_void, data.len()) };
    if ret == -1 {
        Err(std::io::Error::last_os_error())
    } else {
        Ok(ret as usize)
    }
}
